title: MJ's Bosses Revamped
description: Revamps the bosses in the game! Adds random variants, improved boss bars, and more! (but not too much)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iDJZLx7uBU8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**This resource pack adds the bosses of [Mickey Joe's Barely Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default/) to your game!**

This pack includes:

- Pixel consistent Elder Guardian
- 400 different possible Elder Guardian skins
- A reworked, better Ender Dragon
- A custom texture for the exit portal in the End
- A pixel consistent Wither model.
- A very rare variant of the Wither that looks like Herobrine.
- Custom boss bars, based on Minecraft Dungeons
- Custom emoji that appear next to a boss' name (or when a raid happens)

Please enjoy!

Check out the full trailer of my resource pack Barely Default:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hlDLtxC3sK4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
